about.title: About me
text:
Hi, I'm Saqib, a passionate and detail-oriented React Native Developer with a strong foundation in software engineering. I specialize in building robust, user-friendly, and scalable mobile applications for Android and iOS platforms. I bring a combination of academic knowledge and hands-on experience. During my career journey, I’ve had the privilege to:
Intern as a React Native Developer at Apparel X Private Limited from March to June 2024.
Continue as a Junior React Native Developer at the same company from June to November 2024.
In these roles, I’ve honed my skills in creating seamless mobile experiences, integrating cutting-edge technologies like TensorFlow.js, WebView, and Firebase, and solving challenging problems to deliver high-performing apps.
